title: Mahiro Chan Optimized
body:
## Mahiro Chan Optimized :: 마히로짱 최적화 모드팩 **🌍 Please scroll down for an English description**
## 🇰🇷 한국어 부가기능을 조금 첨가한 단순한 최적화 모드팩 ### 🔥 성능 Mahiro Chan Optimized는 여러 Quilt 기반 최적화 모드들을 사용하여 최적의 성능을 이끌어 냅니다.
포함된 최적화 모드들 - [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - [Smooth Boot](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothboot-fabric) - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - [FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit) - [Fastload](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastload) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - [DashLoader](https://modrinth.com/mod/dashloader) - [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)
### ✅ 호환성 Mahiro Chan Optimized는 서버측 모드를 포함하지 않아 모든 월드와 서버에서 작동하며 Windows, Linux 및 Mac과 같은 여러 OS에서 호환됩니다. 또한 **Optifine** 전용 리소스 팩과 셰이더들과 호환됩니다. ### ⚙️ 부가기능 Mahiro Chan Optimized는 **Gamma Utils**와 **LambDynamicLights**과 같은 바닐라 마인크래프트를 해치지 않는 여러 편의성 모드들이 포함되어 있습니다.
포함된 편의성 모드들 - [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - [AntiGhost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost) - [Gamma Utils (Fullbright)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils) - [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining) - [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - [Hold That Chunk](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-that-chunk) - [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - [Don't Clear Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/dcch) - [Interactic](https://modrinth.com/mod/interactic) - [Inspecio](https://modrinth.com/mod/inspecio) - [Screenshot to Clipboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-to-clipboard) - [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
### 🌟 마히로는 귀엽습니다
---
## 🇺🇸 English A simple optimization modpack with a little extra functionality ### 🔥 Performance Mahiro Chan Optimized uses multiple Quilt-based optimization mods to drive optimal performance.
Included optimization modes - [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - [Smooth Boot](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothboot-fabric) - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - [FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit) - [Fastload](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastload) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - [DashLoader](https://modrinth.com/mod/dashloader) - [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)
### ✅ Compatibility Mahiro Chan Optimized does not include any server-side mods, so it works on any world and server, and is compatible with multiple OSes such as Windows, Linux, and Mac. It is also compatible with **Optifine-only** resource packs and shaders ### ⚙️ Add-ons Mahiro Chan Optimized includes a number of convenience mods that do not break vanilla Minecraft, such as **Gamma Utils** and **LambDynamicLights**.
Included convenience modes - [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - [AntiGhost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost) - [Gamma Utils (Fullbright)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils) - [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining) - [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - [Hold That Chunk](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-that-chunk) - [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - [Don't Clear Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/dcch) - [Interactic](https://modrinth.com/mod/interactic) - [Inspecio](https://modrinth.com/mod/inspecio) - [Screenshot to Clipboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-to-clipboard) - [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
### 🌟 MAHRRO IS KAWAII
